Sole-trim model treated as its own family per performance-variant rule. Aston Martin Vantage S press release confirms 680 PS / 671 hp (14 hp over standard Vantage's 656 hp), 0-60 in 3.3 sec (0.1 sec faster than standard), 202 mph top speed unchanged. Aston Martin does not publish US MSRP; per spec §

Roadster body style of Vantage S. Powertrain identical to coupe (671 hp, 590 lb-ft, RWD); only chassis/body-related dimensions and performance change. Singleton trim_family vantage-s-roadster carries the 4 required image angles. Aston Martin does not publish discrete US MSRP for this body style.

Sole-trim model; is_base_trim true with delta_from_base null applied atomically. Powertrain identical to Vantage Coupe (656 hp 4.0L V8 twin-turbo, 8AT, RWD).
